Pearson Accreditation

MENU

Pearson Accreditation

PACE (Preliminary Academic Course of English) program is accredited by the Pearson Assured Organization for a period of 1 year as of 10 May 2022 and with the central code 92685 until 10 May 2023. It has been registered that the PACE complies with 40 quality management and assurance criteria in Organization, Education-Training, and Assessment-Evaluation, and continues its activities in accordance with international language education standards.

Pearson Assured is an internationally recognized quality assurance and accreditation system developed by Pearson, one of the world's largest education solutions companies. Students who successfully complete the PACE Program are entitled to receive the internationally recognized “Pearson Assured Certificate”. The quality assurance and accreditation service provided by Pearson, which operates in the field of educational solutions in more than 100 countries, is developed according to dynamic world standards and is internationally accepted. The certification covers a 1-month process consisting of an application, approval, printing in the UK, and delivery.

Click here to learn more about how to get your certificate.
